town_square.name: Ironhaven Town Square
town_square.description: The beating heart of Ironhaven. A weathered fountain stands at the center, its stone basin cracked from decades of frost. Merchants hawk their wares from canvas stalls. To the north, a dirt road winds toward the Darkwood forest. To the east, stone steps lead up to the garrison.

inn.name: The Rusted Flagon Inn
inn.description: A warm, low-ceilinged tavern that smells of tallow and ale. The innkeeper, a stout woman named Marta, eyes you from behind the bar. A fireplace crackles in the corner.

market.name: Ironhaven Market
market.description: Rows of stalls overflow with goods: dried herbs, second-hand weapons, suspicious potions. The air smells of sawdust and sweat.

garrison.name: Ironhaven Garrison
garrison.description: The town's militia headquarters. Iron-banded doors and arrow slits speak to its defensive purpose. A sergeant paces the courtyard, barking orders at nervous recruits.

darkwood_road.name: Road to the Darkwood
darkwood_road.description: A packed-dirt road that narrows as it approaches the tree line. The canopy ahead is so thick it blocks the sky. Locals don't come here after dark.

darkwood_edge.name: Darkwood Edge
darkwood_edge.description: The first trees of the Darkwood loom overhead, ancient oaks with bark like charred bone. The forest floor is carpeted in shadow. You can hear something moving in the undergrowth.

darkwood_hollow.name: Darkwood Hollow
darkwood_hollow.description: A natural depression in the forest floor, ringed by mossy boulders. Goblin footprints mark the mud. An old chest sits half-buried in leaves.

darkwood_clearing.name: Darkwood Clearing
darkwood_clearing.description: A wide clearing where moonlight actually reaches the ground. A circle of standing stones dominates the center -- ancient and unsettling. Beyond the clearing, a path descends to a ravine.

dire_wolf_den.name: Dire Wolf Den
dire_wolf_den.description: Massive paw prints and the bones of past kills mark this as the territory of something far larger than any common wolf. The smell of wet fur is overwhelming.

ravine_path.name: Ravine Path
ravine_path.description: A narrow trail cuts along the edge of a deep ravine. Loose stones skitter off the edge into darkness. The air grows cold here.

dungeon_01_entrance.name: Ruins Entrance
dungeon_01_entrance.description: The entrance to an ancient ruin, half-swallowed by the earth. Carved stone steps descend into darkness. A faint blue light flickers from somewhere below.
